text:
is a 1st year Attack Junior High School student.

Appearance

Daz has a short crop of spiky gray-colored hair and gray eyes. He wears the standard boys uniform of the school. 

Story

Daz arrives at Attack Junior High School and is in class 1-4. He attends the first-year entrance ceremony, and later flees when Titans invade the area.

Daz participates in the school's dodgeball tournament on Annie's team.

Following a challenge by the upperclassmen, Daz participates in the school's Sports Day games, teaming up with Nack and Milieus.

In the school's 104th festival, Daz, along with Milieus, help operating the stage lights of a Snow White play.

He later watches Ilse Langnar's broadcast of Eren and the others venturing into the principal's office to retrieve their chee-burgs.
